description: VERIFIED LIVE: DigitalOcean via your logged-in cloud.digitalocean.com session (session bridge — no API token). A full read surface over your infrastructure: droplets, App Platform apps, Kubernetes clusters, volumes, load balancers, domains, Spaces keys, and regions. Tested live by Claude Code against a logged-in account — every endpoint below returned 200 JSON.

tools.name: do_droplets
tools.description: Your droplets (VMs) with status, region and size. VERIFIED.

tools.name: do_domains
tools.description: Domains managed in your DigitalOcean DNS. VERIFIED.

tools.name: do_spaces_keys
tools.description: Your Spaces (object storage) access keys. VERIFIED.

tools.name: do_regions
tools.description: Available DigitalOcean regions and their features. VERIFIED.
